title: Maximum Binary Tree II
hints: Notice that appending val changes only the rightmost path of the original tree. Can you trace how the new node fits into that existing structure without rebuilding everything?
Think about the position of val relative to the nodes on the right spine of the current tree. Where does the new root or parent relationship change?
Find the first node on the rightmost path whose value is greater than val. The new node becomes its right child, and that node's previous right child becomes the new node's left child.
